description: Historical Sicilian Mafia clan originating from Castellammare del Golfo, founded in the 1910s. It led the Trapani Mafia family from the 1950s and controlled the mandamento of Trapani until a conflict with the Corleonesi led to the assassination of boss Totò Minore in 1982 and the clan's decline. The clan was involved in narcotics trafficking and money laundering.

country_links.evidence_quote: In 1966, Totò Minore emigrated to the United States and linked up to the Gambino family , opening up a series of pizzerias that were used as a front for narcotics trafficking.
country_links.context: The Minore clan opened pizzerias used as fronts for narcotics trafficking in the United States.
